args: ctx="${SERENA_MCP_CONTEXT:-}"; if [ -z "$ctx" ]; then parent="$(ps -o args= -p "$PPID" 2>/dev/null | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]")"; case "$parent" in *claude*) ctx="claude-code" ;; *codex*) ctx="codex" ;; *) ctx="agent" ;; esac; fi; exec serena start-mcp-server --context "$ctx" --project-from-cwd
